title: We Give More
description: A curated collection of open-air, wellness, leisure, and community spaces designed to make every day feel easier.
summary: Add a videoSrc and thumbnailSrc to any amenity below and the page will render it automatically.

items.title: Rooftop Leisure Deck
items.shortDescription: A calm elevated deck for sunset breaks, quiet conversations, and open-sky evenings.
items.details: Designed as a flexible leisure layer with seating pockets, planting edges, and a relaxed skyline mood.

items.title: Children's Play Area
items.shortDescription: A soft, visible, and welcoming zone for younger residents to play freely.
items.details: Planned for easy supervision, active movement, and everyday neighborhood energy.

items.title: Yoga Lawn
items.shortDescription: A quiet green pause for stretching, meditation, and slow mornings.
items.details: A softer open-air setting shaped for low-noise routines and restorative use.

items.title: Poolside Cabanas
items.shortDescription: Shaded lounge pockets for relaxed afternoons and resort-like breaks.
items.details: A comfort-first amenity zone for cooling off, resting, and spending time with guests.

items.title: Outdoor Gym
items.shortDescription: Open-air fitness for quick strength work without leaving the campus.
items.details: A durable activity zone that keeps everyday movement convenient and visible.

items.title: Mini Cricket Pitch
items.shortDescription: A compact play space made for quick games and weekend energy.
items.details: A community-friendly sports amenity for children, families, and casual players.

items.title: Party Lawn
items.shortDescription: A generous lawn for small celebrations, gatherings, and evening events.
items.details: A flexible outdoor host space that supports community moments without feeling crowded.

items.title: Zen Garden
items.shortDescription: A still garden moment for reading, reflection, and slower breaks.
items.details: Layered planting and seating create a quieter pocket inside the larger landscape.
